query:
ALTER TABLE quotes 
  ADD COLUMN transfer_proof_url TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN transfer_proof_key TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN transfer_confirmed_at DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN transfer_confirmed_by VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN payment_method ENUM('redsys', 'transferencia', 'efectivo', 'otro') NULL;
command:

  ADD COLUMN transfer_proof_key TEXT NULL,

  ADD COLUMN payment_method ENUM('redsys', 'transferencia', 'efectivo', 'otro') NULL;
